completed_tasks.name: Scope revision: eval in v0.1.0, gateway in v0.2.0
Update CLAUDE.md to reflect revised scope

decisions.decision: Fork AWS Agent Skill Eval (MIT-0) instead of building eval from scratch
decisions.rationale: Battle-tested with 621 tests, adds trigger reliability + cost Pareto analysis

decisions.decision: Eval suite moves to v0.1.0, pub/sub deferred to v0.2.0
decisions.rationale: Proving skills work > distributing them. Eval makes governance credible

decisions.decision: Skills gateway is part of skillctl (v0.2.0)
decisions.rationale: Runtime enforcement completes the governance story but is separate concern from build-time

decisions.decision: A-F eval grades map to certification tiers
decisions.rationale: A/B=verified, C=community, D/F=rejected. Reuse eval scoring as certification mechanism
Eval as reward signal, LLM-generated variants, failure-driven improvement. Needs eval maturity first

decisions.decision: Agent Identity + Observability dropped from OSS roadmap
decisions.rationale: Crowded space (Datadog, Arize, LangSmith), platform feature needing UI — cloud-layer candidate
v0.1.0: 3 phases (CLI+Registry+Eval), v0.2.0: 2 phases (Gateway+PubSub), v0.3.0: 2 phases (Optimizer+OptGov)

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 1 to start planning Phase 1 (CLI and Local Governance). All init work is complete.
context_notes: Project initialization fully complete. This session: (1) completed two remaining init tasks (GTM.md eval positioning, CLAUDE.md scope revision note), (2) added v0.3.0 Skill Optimization milestone inspired by MindStudio autoresearch blog post (17 new requirements: OPT-01 to OPT-12, OPG-01 to OPG-05), (3) dropped Agent Identity + Observability from OSS roadmap to cloud-layer. Roadmap is now 7 phases across 3 milestones with 112 total requirements. Ready to plan Phase 1.
